prose:
Property: Atom‐condensed Fukui functions of nitrobenzene.
Level of theory: DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier “standard”), exact four-center integrals (no RI).
Geometry: supplied nitrobenzene.xyz (14 atoms) used as-is; single-point calculations for neutral (N), cation (N–1), and anion (N+1) states – no optimisation (DFT//input-xyz).
Environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent).
Charge/multiplicity: 0/1 (neutral singlet); cation +1/2, anion –1/2.
Backend: chemkit fukui-reactivity skill (PySCF 2.x).
Convergence: SCF achieved for all three charge states; integrity.status = ok, trustworthy = true.
